title: alcea lavateriflora var. glabrescens
intro: Alcea lavateriflora var. glabrescens, also known as the smooth hollyhock, is a variety of flowering plant native to China. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The smooth hollyhock is valued for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the flowers or roots in hot water to create a tea, or by mixing the dried plant material with other herbs to create a decoction.
